issues.description: pods.listStored cache TTL is 15_000 (seconds) = 4+ hours. All other routers use 15-30 seconds. Redis setEx() takes seconds, not ms. This will serve stale pod data for hours.
issues.fix: Change `15_000` to `15` (15 seconds) to match existing pods.list pattern on line 18

issues.description: logs.stream procedure has no .output() schema. All other procedures in this router and other routers use explicit output schemas for type safety and OpenAPI generation.
issues.fix: Add .output(z.object({ lines: z.array(z.string()), podName: z.string(), container: z.string().nullable(), timestamp: z.string() }))

issues.description: pods.listStored has no .output() schema. Missing output validation means no type safety guarantee for the frontend and no OpenAPI docs.
issues.fix: Add explicit .output() Zod schema matching the return shape { pods: z.array(...), offline: z.boolean(), lastSeen: z.string().nullable() }

issues.description: services.listByCluster is an exact duplicate of services.list — same input, same logic, same output. Creates maintenance burden for zero benefit.
issues.fix: Consider making listByCluster delegate to the list procedure internally, or remove it entirely since the frontend uses services.list

issues.description: logs.stream procedure is added but not used by any frontend page (logs page uses logs.get and logs.pods). Dead code until consumed.
issues.fix: Either wire frontend to use logs.stream or document as planned future use

issues.description: PIPE-005 Visual Anti-Pattern: Deployments ready column shows 0/0 in GREEN. Logic `const ok = a === b` treats 0/0 as healthy. Zero replicas with zero ready is not a success state.
issues.fix: Change to: `const ok = a === b && Number(a) > 0` — show muted/dim color for 0/0

issues.description: Unused variable `podOptions` in logs page. Assigned via useMemo but never referenced — `pods` is used directly everywhere.
issues.fix: Remove `const podOptions = useMemo(() => pods, [pods])` — it's dead code

issues.description: Unused import `useParams` in CommandPalette.tsx. Only usePathname and useRouter are actually used.
Events page mobileCard prop has inconsistent indentation (6 spaces vs 8 spaces for sibling props). Cosmetic but violates code style.
issues.fix: Align mobileCard indentation with other DataTable props (8 spaces)

issues.description: Multiple pages use unsafe cast `(dbCluster.data as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.hasCredentials` — repeated 7+ times across cluster pages. Should be a typed helper or the clusters.get output schema should include hasCredentials.
issues.fix: Extract to a shared hook like `useClusterCredentials(id)` or add hasCredentials to the tRPC output type

issues.description: Log viewer line coloring uses broad regex `/error|fatal|panic/i` which would highlight lines containing words like 'terror', 'waterfall', etc. False positive risk.
Keyboard shortcut keys 1-9 in layout.tsx could conflict with browser shortcuts in some locales. Consider showing shortcut hints in the tab UI.
issues.fix: No action needed — modifier check already prevents conflicts. Consider adding visual hint.

architectureCheck.notes: server.ts has only comments about migrate being removed — correct. No runtime schema changes.

e2eCheck.notes: No E2E tests exist for new Phase 2 features (deployments table, services table, namespaces table, logs viewer, autoscaling page, keyboard shortcuts 1-9/[/], command palette cluster tabs). Existing keyboard-shortcuts.spec.ts only tests ? modal. Missing test coverage does not block since these are new pages replacing placeholder stubs, but should be added.

notes: Overall solid Phase 2 implementation. Backend adds useful procedures with proper auth (protectedProcedure), good error handling, and caching. Frontend follows existing tRPC patterns correctly (trpc.router.method.useQuery). One HIGH issue: pods.listStored has 15,000 second cache TTL (should be 15s). Three MEDIUM issues: PIPE-005 green-on-zero visual bug, unused variable, unused import. Architecture check passes — no migrate() calls, no schema conflicts. Frontend correctly uses existing list procedures rather than the new listByCluster/listStored. Recommend fixing the HIGH and MEDIUM issues before merge.

findings.description: pods.listStored cache TTL 15_000 seconds (4+ hrs) — should be 15
PIPE-005: Deployments ready 0/0 shown in green
Unused podOptions variable in logs page
logs.stream added but unused by frontend
Repeated unsafe hasCredentials cast across 7+ files
Log line regex matches partial words (terror, waterfall)
